steps.title: Identify the favorable/total counts
steps.content: Total attendees $= 400$. Since every attendee is in room A, B, or C, the probabilities sum to 1. So $P(C) = 1 - 0.60 - 0.35 = 0.05$.

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content:
Multiply by the total to get the count in room C:
$$0.05 \times 400 = 20$$
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
